title: vaccinium oblongifolium
intro: Vaccinium oblongifolium, also known as oval-leaved blueberry or oval-leaved bilberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the mountains of northern Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vaccinium oblongifolium include supporting eye health, reducing blood pressure, and improving cognitive function. Vaccinium oblongifolium can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, or dried extract, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
